/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libfast_lio_sam_g__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libfast_lio_sam_g__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/fast_lio_sam_g__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/fast_lio_sam_g/msg/pose6_d__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jacky/workspace/build/fast_lio_sam_g:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libfast_lio_sam_g__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
